title: Learning series by School of Lifelong Learning
content: Learning series by School of Lifelong Learning Event Date: 25th - 26th May 2024 Speakers: - Mr.Naveen Nanda, Senior GM at Havells India Ltd Topic: "Knowledge alone is not enough to wield power" - Garima Virmani, Data Analyst at Bank of America Topic: "Dopamine Detox" Audience: School of Business (207 students) - The event targeted students from the School of Business, suggesting that the topics were tailored to their academic and professional interests. Event Highlights: - The session was interactive and interesting, providing valuable guidance for students as they prepare for their professional journeys. - Naveen Nanda discussed the importance of skills like leadership, communication, and emotional intelligence alongside knowledge in achieving success in the business world. - Garima Virmani probably delved into the concept of dopamine detoxification, which involves reducing reliance on instant gratification and increasing focus on long-term goals. Event Content: - Both sessions were described as interactive and interesting, indicating that the speakers engaged the audience effectively. - Naveen Nanda's talk likely provided insights and anecdotes from his professional experience at Havells India Ltd, offering valuable lessons for the students. - Garima Virmani's discussion on dopamine detox may have included strategies for managing distractions and improving productivity, which are crucial skills for students entering the workforce. Mentor Name – Neeraj Sahani Department Name – School Of Life Long Learning Related Goal
